chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-200 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1) For orders on M.A No.1483/25 (urgency). 2) For orders on office objections. 3) For orders on M.A No.1484/25. 4) For hearing of main case. 04.03.2025. Mr. Mashooque Ali Mahar, Advocate for applicants/accused. *_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_*_* Counsel for the applicants/accused is seeking protective bail for applicants/accused (i) Niaz Ali Roonjho s/o Muhammad Achar Roonjho (ii) Gulshan Ali Roonjho s/o Muhammad Achar Roonjho (iii) Ameer Ali Roonjho s/o Muhammad Achar Roonjho in Crime No.118 of 2023 registered at Police Station Belar District Lasbela U/s 506, 504, 420, 34-PPC. He further states that the applicants/accused are innocent and have no concerned with the alleged offence; that the FIR is delayed without any plausible explanation. Be that as it may, this is a case of protective bail, which is hereby granted to the applicants/accused in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees Thirty Thousand Only) each and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court for a period of Seven days. Applicants/accused are directed to surrender themselves and join the investigation within stipulated time. Needless to say that this order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of Seven days or when the applicants/accused surrender before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier and during such period the N.B.Ws, if any, issued by the Trial Court shall remain suspended. In case applicants/accused fails to appear/surrender before the concerned court within the stipulated period, the surety furnished by them before this court shall automatically stand forfeited.

Needless to say that this order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of Seven days or when the applicants/accused surrender before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier and during such period the N.B.Ws, if any, issued by the Trial Court shall remain suspended. In case applicants/accused fails to appear/surrender before the concerned court within the stipulated period, the surety furnished by them before this court shall automatically stand forfeited. This Cr. Bail Application along with pending applications stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ali.
